cases.name: quotes-and-positionals
cases.script: printf '%s:%s:%s\n' "$NAME" '$NAME' "$1"

cases.name: and-or-negation
cases.script: false && echo no; true || echo no; ! false && echo yes

cases.name: assignment-scope
cases.script:
A=one; printf '%s
' "$A"; A=temp printf '%s
' "$A"; printf '%s
' "$A"

cases.name: quoted-at
cases.script: printf '<%s>\n' "$@"

cases.name: quoted-at-empty-argv-count
cases.script:
show() { printf '<%s>' "$#"; for value; do printf ':<%s>' "$value"; done; }
show "$@"
printf '|'
show '' 'two words'

cases.name: printf-repeat
cases.script: printf '[%s]\n' one two three

cases.name: assignment-order
cases.script: unset A B; A=1 B=$A; printf 'A=<%s> B=<%s>\n' "$A" "$B"

cases.name: touch-no-create-missing-target
cases.script:
touch -c missing
printf '%s|' "$?"
[[ ! -e missing ]] && printf absent

cases.name: unquoted-at-splitting
cases.script: printf '<%s>\n' $@

cases.name: pipeline-status
cases.script:
printf 'b
a
' | sort | head -n 1; printf '%s
' "$?"

cases.name: comm-utf8-byte-order
cases.script:
printf '𐀀\n\n' > unsorted
sort unsorted > left
sort unsorted > right
comm left right

cases.name: c-locale-case-folding-and-word-boundaries
cases.script:
printf 'k
K
K
' | grep -i k
printf '<%d>
' "$(printf 'a b c	d
' | wc -w)"

cases.name: final-unterminated-record-deduplication
cases.script:
printf 'x
x' | uniq
printf 'x
y' | uniq
printf 'x
x' | sort -u
printf 'x
y' | sort -u
printf '1
01
1' | sort -n -u
cases.stdout:
x
x
y
x
x
y
01

cases.name: cut-delimiter-free-and-empty-fields
cases.script:
printf 'plain
a:b
' | cut -d : -f 2
printf ':a::b:
' | cut -d : -f 1,3,5

cases.name: nl-default-skips-blank-lines
cases.script:
printf '

' | nl
printf '
a

b

' | nl

cases.name: redirection-and-glob
cases.script: mkdir fixture; printf b > fixture/b; printf a > fixture/a; printf '<%s>\n' fixture/*

cases.name: comment-and-escaped-dollar
cases.script:
# comment
printf '<%s>\n' "\$HOME"

cases.name: compound-control-flow
cases.script: count=0; if false; then printf no; elif true; then printf 'if|'; fi; for item in a b; do printf '%s' "$item"; done; while ((count < 2)); do ((count += 1)); done; until ((count >= 3)); do ((count++)); done; case $count in 3) printf '|case' ;; *) printf no ;; esac

cases.name: bracket-expression-case-and-pathname-semantics
cases.script:
case ']' in []a]) printf leading;; *) printf no;; esac
case a in [!]]) printf '|negated';; *) printf no;; esac
case a in [z-a]) printf no;; *) printf '|descending';; esac
case c in [z-ac]) printf '|tail\n';; *) printf no;; esac
touch a z c ']'
printf '<%s>\n' []a] [z-a] [z-ac]

cases.name: groups-and-subshells
cases.script: X=outer; { X=group; }; printf '%s|' "$X"; (X=sub; printf '%s|' "$X"); printf '%s' "$X"

cases.name: function-local-return
cases.script: X=global; show() { local X=local; test "$1" = stop && return 7; printf '%s:%s' "$X" "$1"; }; show go; printf '|%s|' "$X"; show stop || printf '%s' "$?"

cases.name: signed-return-and-exit-statuses
cases.script:
status() { return "$1"; }
status -1; printf '%s|' "$?"
status 0; printf '%s|' "$?"
status 255; printf '%s|' "$?"
status 256; printf '%s|' "$?"
status invalid 2>return-error; printf '%s|' "$?"
(exit -1); printf '%s|' "$?"
(exit invalid) 2>exit-error; printf '%s' "$?"

cases.name: substitution-parameter-arithmetic
cases.script: unset X EMPTY; EMPTY=; printf '<%s>|' "${X:-default}"; printf '<%s>|' "${EMPTY-default}"; printf '<%s>|' "${X:=assigned}"; printf '<%s>|' "${X:+alternate}"; printf '<%s>|' "${#X}"; printf '<%s>|' "$(printf 'line\n\n')"; N=2; printf '%s|' "$((N * 3))"; ((N += 4)); printf '%s' "$N"

cases.name: arithmetic-octal-and-invalid-exponents
cases.script:
VALUE=010
printf '<%s>|<%s>|' "$((010))" "$((VALUE))"
printf '%s\n' 'printf x "$((08))"' > bad-octal
. ./bad-octal 2>octal-error && printf no || printf 'octal-failed|'
printf '%s\n' 'printf x "$((2**-1))"' > bad-exponent
. ./bad-exponent 2>exponent-error && printf no || printf exponent-failed

cases.name: assignment-substitution-status
cases.script: VALUE=$(false); printf '%s|' "$?"; VALUE=$(true); printf '%s' "$?"

cases.name: redirection-substitution-status
cases.script: X= > "$(printf first; false)"; printf '%s|' "$?"; X=$(false) > "$(printf second; true)"; printf '%s|' "$?"; > "$(printf third; false)" X=$(true); printf '%s' "$?"

cases.name: nested-parameter-command-substitution
cases.script: unset X Y; printf '<%s>' "${X:-$(printf %s ${Y:-deep})}"

cases.name: command-substitution-case-and-heredoc-delimiters
malformed-compound-command-statuses
cases.script:
printf '%s\n' '()' > bad1
printf '%s\n' '{ }' > bad2
printf '%s\n' 'if then printf yes; fi' > bad3
printf '%s\n' 'if true; then fi' > bad4
printf '%s\n' 'while do break; done' > bad5
printf '%s\n' 'while false; do done' > bad6
printf '%s\n' '{ printf ok }' > bad7
. ./bad1 2>err1; printf '%s|' "$?"
. ./bad2 2>err2; printf '%s|' "$?"
. ./bad3 2>err3; printf '%s|' "$?"
. ./bad4 2>err4; printf '%s|' "$?"
. ./bad5 2>err5; printf '%s|' "$?"
. ./bad6 2>err6; printf '%s|' "$?"
. ./bad7 2>err7; printf '%s' "$?"

cases.name: heredoc-and-here-string
cases.script:
NAME=world
cat <<EOF
hello $NAME
$(printf nested)
EOF
cat <<'LITERAL'
$NAME
LITERAL
cat <<< "$NAME"

cases.name: source-current-scope-arguments-and-return
cases.script:
cat > library.sh <<'EOF'
X=sourced
show() { printf '%s' "$X"; }
printf '<%s:%s>|' "$1" "$#"
return 7
EOF
X=outer
source ./library.sh argument || printf '%s|' "$?"
show
printf '|%s' "$X"

cases.name: nested-source-failure-status
cases.script:
cat > inner.sh <<'EOF'
printf inner
return 4
EOF
cat > outer.sh <<'EOF'
. ./inner.sh || printf ':%s|' "$?"
return 6
EOF
source ./outer.sh || printf ':%s' "$?"

cases.name: read-records-and-fields
cases.script:
{ read -r FIRST SECOND; read -r THIRD; printf '<%s>|<%s>|<%s>' "$FIRST" "$SECOND" "$THIRD"; } <<'EOF'
  alpha   beta gamma  
tail
EOF

cases.name: shift-positional-arguments
cases.script: shift; printf '%s:%s|' "$1" "$#"; shift 2; printf '%s:%s' "$1" "$#"

cases.name: getopts-clusters-arguments-and-reset
cases.script: while getopts ':ab:' OPT; do printf '%s:<%s>:%s|' "$OPT" "$OPTARG" "$OPTIND"; done; OPTIND=1; while getopts ':ab:' OPT; do printf '%s:<%s>:%s|' "$OPT" "$OPTARG" "$OPTIND"; done

cases.name: read-partial-eof-and-atomic-shift-failure
cases.script: printf partial | { read -r VALUE; printf '%s:<%s>|' "$?" "$VALUE"; }; shift 9 || printf '%s:%s:%s' "$?" "$1" "$#"

cases.name: getopts-hidden-cursor-and-local-reset
cases.script: getopts abc OPT -abc; printf '%s|' "$OPT"; getopts xyz OPT -xyz; printf '%s|' "$OPT"; OPTIND=1; getopts abc OPT -abc; printf '%s|' "$OPT"; parse() { local OPTIND=1; getopts abc OPT -abc; printf '%s|' "$OPT"; }; parse; parse

cases.name: getopts-silent-errors
cases.script: while getopts ':ab:' OPT; do printf '%s:<%s>:%s|' "$OPT" "$OPTARG" "$OPTIND"; done

cases.name: parameter-pattern-split-and-glob-order
cases.script: mkdir -p g; : > g/a; : > g/b; Y='left right'; G='g/*tail'; printf '<%s>\n' ${Y#z}; printf '[%s]\n' ${G%tail}

cases.name: nounset-defaults-and-positionals
cases.script: set -u; unset A; EMPTY=; printf '<%s>|<%s>|<%s>|<%s>|' "${A-default}" "${EMPTY-default}" "${A+alternate}" "${EMPTY:+alternate}"; printf '%s:<%s>:<%s>' "$#" "$1" "$2"

cases.name: nounset-arithmetic-and-disable-forms
cases.script: set -o nounset; ((VALUE = 1)); ((0 && MISSING)) || :; ((1 || MISSING)); set +o nounset; printf '%s:<%s>' "$VALUE" "$MISSING"; set -u; set +u

cases.name: nounset-isolated-disable-scopes
cases.script: set -u; (set +u; printf '<%s>' "$MISSING"); VALUE=$(set +u; printf '<%s>' "$MISSING"); printf '|%s' "$VALUE"

cases.name: nounset-top-level-failure
cases.script: set -u; printf before; printf '%s' "$MISSING" || printf caught; printf after

cases.name: nounset-isolated-failure-statuses
cases.script: set -u; (printf '%s' "$MISSING"); SUB=$?; printf '%s' "$MISSING" | cat; PIPE=$?; VALUE=$(printf '%s' "$MISSING"); COMMAND=$?; printf '%s:%s:%s:<%s>' "$SUB" "$PIPE" "$COMMAND" "$VALUE"
cases.stderr:
MISSING: unbound variable
MISSING: unbound variable
MISSING: unbound variable

cases.name: nounset-braced-at-fields
cases.script: set -u; printf '%s|' "${#@}"; printf '<%s>' "${@-default}"; printf '|<%s>' "${@+alternate}"

cases.name: double-bracket-strings-and-patterns
cases.script: mkdir -p tree; : > tree/file; VALUE='two words'; GLOB='tree/*'; PATTERN='a*'; [[ -n $VALUE && $VALUE == "two words" && $GLOB == 'tree/*' && abc == $PATTERN && abc != "$PATTERN" ]] && printf yes

cases.name: double-bracket-booleans-integers-and-ordering
cases.script: set -u; [[ 01 -eq 1 && 1 -ne 2 && -2 -lt -1 && -1 -le -1 && 3 -gt 2 && 2 -ge 2 && alpha < beta && beta > alpha && ( x == x || $MISSING ) && ( x != x && $MISSING || x ) && ! -z x ]] && printf yes

cases.name: double-bracket-vfs-metadata-profile
cases.script: mkdir -p tree; printf x > tree/file; [[ -e tree/file && -f tree/file && -d tree && ! -e tree/missing ]] && printf yes

cases.name: errexit-option-forms-and-simple-failure
cases.script: set -e; set +e; false; printf a; set -o errexit; set +o errexit; false; printf b; set -e; printf '|'; false; printf no

cases.name: errexit-list-condition-and-negation-suppression
cases.script: set -e; false && printf no; printf 'and|'; true || printf no; printf 'or|'; if false; then printf no; else printf 'if|'; fi; while false; do printf no; done; until true; do printf no; done; ! true; printf 'not|'; true && false; printf no

cases.name: errexit-compound-suppression-propagation
cases.script: set -e; run() { false; printf f; }; run || printf no; { false; printf g; } || printf no; (false; printf s) || printf no; printf '|'; run; printf no

cases.name: errexit-pipeline-and-pipefail
cases.script: set -e; false | true; printf 'default|'; set -o pipefail; false | true; printf no

cases.name: errexit-command-substitution-clears-option
cases.script: set -e; VALUE=$(false; printf value); printf '%s|' "$VALUE"; printf '%s' "$(set -e; false; printf no)"; printf '|after'

cases.name: errexit-assignment-substitution-status
cases.script: set -e; VALUE=$(false); printf no

cases.name: errexit-source-and-delayed-enable
cases.script: printf 'false\nprintf sourced' > library.sh; set +e; run() { set -e; false; printf body; }; run || printf fallback; printf '|'; source ./library.sh || printf fallback; printf '|'; source ./library.sh; printf no

cases.name: errexit-preserves-protected-compound-status
cases.script: set -e; { false && true; }; printf g; if true; then false && true; fi; printf i; case x in x) false && true ;; esac; printf c; for item in x; do false && true; done; printf f; (false && true); printf no

cases.name: errexit-rechecks-protected-function-status
cases.script: set -e; run() { false && true; }; run; printf no
